name: UploadThing
description: UploadThing is a file upload service for modern web apps. It handles file uploads from server or URLs, file listing, deletion, renaming, signed URL generation, and access control management via a simple REST API.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload files directly from your server. Generates presigned URLs and uploads to storage.

capabilities.name: files_upload_from_url
capabilities.description: Upload files by providing external URLs. UploadThing fetches and stores them.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List all uploaded files with pagination.

capabilities.name: files_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more files by file key or custom ID.

capabilities.name: files_rename
capabilities.description: Rename one or more uploaded files.

capabilities.name: files_get_signed_url
capabilities.description: Generate a time-limited signed URL for accessing a private file.

capabilities.name: files_update_acl
capabilities.description: Change file access control between public-read and private.

capabilities.name: files_get_usage
capabilities.description: Get current storage usage and limits for your UploadThing app.
